summary: Good soundboard recording of a fun, informal show with Celtic guests, though the performance is considered average.
review: The set captures an entertaining night featuring Walton and his Celtic collaborators, delivering a lively vibe that many listeners enjoy. The FLAC‑16 soundboard source is praised as “great,” providing clear and balanced audio, but the musical content receives mixed feedback with no specific highlights noted.

ai_rating.rationale: One reviewer rates it positively (4 stars) praising the recording; another calls it average (3 stars) with no standout moments. Weighted toward show quality (70%) yields a modest overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as “great recording”; clear FLAC‑16 soundboard capture with no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Informal, upbeat performance featuring Celtic guest musicians; reviewers found it enjoyable but not exceptional.
